(b) result in the assignment of a case to a Diagnosis Related Group (DRG)* that has a higher payment

(c) could reasonably have been prevented through the application of evidence-based guidelines. 

*States that do not use the grouper methodology may use CMS-approved methodology that is

There is a POA indicator code associated with each diagnosis code (principal and secondary).
